name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Direct income support for eligible landholding farmer families.
descriptionDetailed: PM-KISAN provides Rs. 6,000 per year in three equal installments to eligible farmer families, subject to land record and exclusion checks.

notes: Applicant should be part of an eligible landholding farmer family.
Institutional landholders and higher-income exclusion categories are not eligible.

benefits.title: Income support
benefits.description: Paid as three installments of Rs. 2,000.

applicationProcess.title: Check land records
applicationProcess.description: Keep land ownership details and bank account ready.

applicationProcess.title: Register online or through officials
applicationProcess.description: Use the PM-KISAN portal or local agriculture office/CSC.

applicationProcess.title: Track status
applicationProcess.description: Use beneficiary status on the portal after registration.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awaas Yojana - Gramin
description: Housing assistance for eligible rural households without a pucca house.
descriptionDetailed: PMAY-G supports construction of durable rural houses for households identified through deprivation and local verification criteria.

notes: Rural household should not own a pucca house.
Priority is based on deprivation data and Gram Sabha verification.

benefits.title: Housing assistance
benefits.description: Assistance varies by plain or hilly/difficult area.

applicationProcess.title: Check beneficiary list
applicationProcess.description: Use the PMAY-G portal or contact the Gram Panchayat.

applicationProcess.title: Verify details locally
applicationProcess.description: Household details are verified by local officials.

applicationProcess.title: Receive installment support
applicationProcess.description: Approved beneficiaries receive support through DBT-linked stages.

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: Cashless hospital treatment cover for eligible poor and vulnerable families.
descriptionDetailed: PM-JAY provides health cover for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization at empanelled hospitals for eligible households.

notes: Eligibility is generally based on deprivation and occupational categories.
Families can check eligibility on the beneficiary portal.

benefits.title: Hospital cover
benefits.description: Cashless treatment at empanelled hospitals.

applicationProcess.title: Check eligibility
applicationProcess.description: Use the beneficiary portal or visit a CSC/Ayushman Mitra.

applicationProcess.title: Generate Ayushman card
applicationProcess.description: Complete verification at a CSC, hospital help desk, or official app.

applicationProcess.title: Use at hospital
applicationProcess.description: Show the card at an empanelled hospital help desk.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Low-cost life insurance cover through a bank or post office account.
descriptionDetailed: PMJJBY is a renewable one-year life insurance cover for eligible account holders, with premium paid through auto-debit.

notes: Applicant must have a savings bank or post office account.
Premium is auto-debited after consent.

benefits.title: Life cover
benefits.description: Insurance cover for death due to any reason.

applicationProcess.title: Contact bank or post office
applicationProcess.description: Ask for PMJJBY enrollment.

applicationProcess.title: Submit consent form
applicationProcess.description: Authorize annual premium auto-debit from one account only.

applicationProcess.title: Renew yearly
applicationProcess.description: Maintain balance before renewal period.

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Low-cost accidental death and disability insurance.
descriptionDetailed: PMSBY is a renewable accidental insurance cover for eligible bank or post office account holders.

notes: Applicant must have a participating bank or post office account.
Enrollment is through one account only.

benefits.title: Accident cover
benefits.description: Cover depends on death, total disability, or partial disability.

applicationProcess.title: Visit bank or post office
applicationProcess.description: Ask for PMSBY enrollment.

applicationProcess.title: Submit consent
applicationProcess.description: Authorize annual premium auto-debit.

applicationProcess.title: Keep nominee updated
applicationProcess.description: Update nominee details when needed.

name: National Scholarship Portal
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
description: Single portal for central and state education scholarships.
descriptionDetailed: NSP helps students discover, apply for, and track scholarship schemes from multiple ministries and states.

notes: Eligibility depends on the selected scholarship.
Most scholarships require current enrollment and income/category proof.

benefits.title: Scholarship support
benefits.description: Tuition, maintenance, or merit-based support depending on scheme.

applicationProcess.title: Register on NSP
applicationProcess.description: Create a student profile on the official portal.

applicationProcess.title: Select eligible scheme
applicationProcess.description: Use profile details to find available scholarships.

applicationProcess.title: Submit and track
applicationProcess.description: Upload documents and track verification online.

name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana
description: Loans for non-corporate, non-farm micro and small enterprises.
descriptionDetailed: MUDRA supports small entrepreneurs through Shishu, Kishor, and Tarun loan categories via banks, MFIs, and NBFCs.

notes: Business should be a non-corporate, non-farm income-generating activity.
Loan sanction is by lending institutions.

benefits.title: Business loan
benefits.description: Credit support through Shishu, Kishor, and Tarun categories.

applicationProcess.title: Prepare business details
applicationProcess.description: Collect business plan, ID, and bank details.

applicationProcess.title: Apply through lender
applicationProcess.description: Approach a bank/MFI/NBFC or use Udyamimitra.

applicationProcess.title: Complete lender checks
applicationProcess.description: Submit documents requested by the lending institution.

name: DAY-NRLM Self Help Groups
description: Rural livelihood support through women-led self-help groups.
descriptionDetailed: DAY-NRLM mobilizes rural poor households into self-help groups and supports savings, credit linkage, skills, and livelihoods.

notes: Designed mainly for rural poor households, especially women.
Access is usually through local SHG/community institutions.

benefits.title: SHG livelihood support
benefits.description: Savings, bank linkage, livelihood training, and enterprise support.

applicationProcess.title: Contact local mission staff
applicationProcess.description: Ask the Gram Panchayat or block mission team about SHGs.

applicationProcess.title: Join or form SHG
applicationProcess.description: Participate in group savings and meetings.

applicationProcess.title: Access credit and training
applicationProcess.description: Use SHG linkage for livelihood activities.

name: MGNREGA
description: Legal entitlement to demand wage employment for rural households.
descriptionDetailed: MGNREGA provides wage employment on demand to adult members of rural households willing to do unskilled manual work.

notes: Applicant must be an adult member of a rural household.
Work is requested through a job card.

benefits.title: Wage employment
benefits.description: Wages are paid for approved unskilled manual work.

applicationProcess.title: Apply for job card
applicationProcess.description: Submit household details to Gram Panchayat.

applicationProcess.title: Demand work
applicationProcess.description: Request work when needed through the Panchayat.

applicationProcess.title: Track payments
applicationProcess.description: Track muster roll and payment status on the official portal.

helplineNumber: Contact Gram Panchayat / district programme officer

name: e-Shram Card
description: National database registration for unorganised workers.
descriptionDetailed: e-Shram registers unorganised workers so they can be connected to social security and welfare benefits.

notes: Worker should be in the unorganised sector.
Applicant should not be a member of EPFO/ESIC/NPS government-funded coverage.

benefits.title: Worker registration
benefits.description: Connects eligible workers to social security delivery.

applicationProcess.title: Register on portal
applicationProcess.description: Use self-registration or visit a CSC.

applicationProcess.title: Complete verification
applicationProcess.description: Provide required mobile and identity details on the official portal.

applicationProcess.title: Download card
applicationProcess.description: Download the e-Shram card after registration.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Crop insurance against notified natural risks for notified crops.
descriptionDetailed: PMFBY provides crop insurance for farmers growing notified crops in notified areas, including sharecroppers and tenant farmers with required documents.

notes: Farmer must have insurable interest in a notified crop and area.
Enrollment is season-bound and optional for farmers as per current guidelines.

benefits.title: Crop risk cover
benefits.description: Farmer premium is capped for major crop categories; claims depend on notified loss assessment.

applicationProcess.title: Check crop notification
applicationProcess.description: Confirm crop, season, and area on PMFBY portal.

applicationProcess.title: Enroll before cut-off
applicationProcess.description: Apply online, through bank, or CSC before season deadline.

applicationProcess.title: Report losses quickly
applicationProcess.description: Use portal/helpline/insurer process for localized losses.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
description: Placement-linked skill training for rural poor youth.
descriptionDetailed: DDU-GKY trains rural youth from poor households and links them with jobs that provide regular wages.

notes: Designed for rural poor youth.
Upper age relaxation may apply for women and vulnerable groups.

benefits.title: Skill training
benefits.description: Training, counselling, and placement-linked support.

applicationProcess.title: Find training centre
applicationProcess.description: Use DDU-GKY resources or contact district rural livelihood mission.

applicationProcess.title: Register for course
applicationProcess.description: Choose a suitable trade and complete enrollment.

applicationProcess.title: Complete placement support
applicationProcess.description: Attend training, assessment, and placement activities.

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
description: Monthly pension support for eligible older persons from BPL households.
descriptionDetailed: IGNOAPS provides central pension assistance for people aged 60 and above who belong to BPL households, with states adding their contribution.

notes: Applicant should be age 60 or above.
Household should be below poverty line as per applicable criteria.

benefits.title: Monthly pension
benefits.description: State contribution can increase the pension amount.

applicationProcess.title: Contact local office
applicationProcess.description: Apply through Gram Panchayat, municipality, or social welfare office.

applicationProcess.title: Submit proof
applicationProcess.description: Provide age, residence, income/BPL, and bank details.

applicationProcess.title: Track pension
applicationProcess.description: Track through state portal or NSAP reporting where available.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: Short-term skill training and certification for youth.
descriptionDetailed: PMKVY helps youth access industry-relevant skill training, certification, and career pathways through approved skill centers.

notes: Eligibility can vary by job role and training type.
Candidate should meet age and course prerequisites.

benefits.title: Training and certification
benefits.description: Skill training, assessment, certification, and counselling.

applicationProcess.title: Find course
applicationProcess.description: Use Skill India Digital or PMKVY resources.

applicationProcess.title: Register with center
applicationProcess.description: Choose a nearby training center or online course.

applicationProcess.title: Complete assessment
applicationProcess.description: Attend training and assessment for certification.

name: PM SVANidhi
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Collateral-free working capital loan support for street vendors.
descriptionDetailed: PM SVANidhi supports eligible street vendors with working capital loans in progressive tranches and incentives for repayment and digital transactions.

notes: Applicant should be an eligible street vendor or hawker.
Certificate of vending, ID card, or Letter of Recommendation may be required.

benefits.title: Working capital loan
benefits.description: Initial and repeat loans based on repayment history.

applicationProcess.title: Check vendor documents
applicationProcess.description: Keep vending ID/certificate or request Letter of Recommendation.

applicationProcess.title: Apply on portal
applicationProcess.description: Submit application on PM SVANidhi portal.

applicationProcess.title: Repay digitally
applicationProcess.description: Timely repayment improves eligibility for next tranche.

name: PM Vishwakarma
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description: Holistic support to artisans and craftspeople through skill training, toolkit incentives, and credit support.
descriptionDetailed: A Central Sector Scheme to provide end-to-end support to artisans and craftspeople working with their hands. It includes skill training, a toolkit incentive of ₹15,000, and collateral-free credit support up to ₹3 lakh.

notes: Must be a practicing artisan/craftsperson engaged in one of the 18 family-based traditional trades.
Only one member per family is eligible.

benefits.title: Toolkit Incentive
benefits.description: Given at the beginning of basic skill training.

benefits.title: Credit Support
benefits.description: Collateral-free credit in two tranches with concessional interest rate.

applicationProcess.title: CSC Registration
applicationProcess.description: Register directly via Common Service Centres with Aadhaar.

name: PM Shram Yogi Maan-dhan (PM-SYM)
description: A voluntary and contributory pension scheme for unorganized workers.
descriptionDetailed: Under this scheme, subscribers receive a minimum assured pension of ₹3000 per month after attaining the age of 60 years. If the subscriber dies, the spouse of the beneficiary shall be entitled to receive 50% of the pension.

notes: Monthly income should not exceed ₹15,000.
Should not be engaged in Organized Sector.
Should not be an income taxpayer.

benefits.title: Assured Pension
benefits.description: Minimum assured pension after 60 years of age.

applicationProcess.title: Nearest CSC
applicationProcess.description: Visit nearest Common Service Centre with Aadhaar and Savings Bank account.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Provides farmers with timely credit support from the banking system with flexible and simplified procedures.
descriptionDetailed: The Kisan Credit Card scheme aims to meet the short term credit requirements for cultivation of crops, post-harvest expenses, produce marketing loan, and consumption requirements of farmer households. Allied activities like dairy and inland fishery are also supported.

notes: All farmers (individuals/joint borrowers) who are owner cultivators.
Tenant farmers, oral lessees & share croppers.

benefits.title: Credit limit
benefits.description: Short-term credit limits for crop and allied activities.

benefits.title: Interest Subvention
benefits.description: Concession for prompt repayment.

applicationProcess.title: Bank Branch
applicationProcess.description: Apply via nearest commercial bank, regional rural bank, or cooperative bank.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Promotes entrepreneurship among women and SC/ST communities for setting up greenfield enterprises.
descriptionDetailed: Aims to facilitate bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 Crore to at least one SC or ST borrower, and at least one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise. This enterprise may be in manufacturing, services, agri-allied activities, or the trading sector.

notes: Must be an SC/ST OR a Woman entrepreneur.
Loans under the scheme are available for only green field projects.

benefits.title: Bank Loan
benefits.description: Composite loan (inclusive of term loan and working capital).

applicationProcess.title: Online or Branch
applicationProcess.description: Access directly at the branch or through the Stand-Up India portal.

name: Prime Minister Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description: Credit-linked subsidy support for new micro-enterprises in rural and urban areas.
descriptionDetailed: PMEGP supports new self-employment ventures and micro-enterprises through bank-linked loans with margin money subsidy. It is intended to help traditional artisans, aspiring entrepreneurs, and unemployed youth start non-farm businesses.

notes: Applicant must be setting up a new micro-enterprise project.
Manufacturing and service projects above certain cost thresholds may require at least Class 8 education.
Existing units that already received similar government subsidy are not eligible.

benefits.title: Margin money subsidy
benefits.description: Government subsidy is routed through banks to support eligible new micro-enterprises.

benefits.title: Project support
benefits.amount: Up to Rs. 50 lakh manufacturing / Rs. 20 lakh service
benefits.description: Eligible project ceilings depend on the sector and current scheme guidelines.

applicationProcess.title: Prepare business idea
applicationProcess.description: Choose a new non-farm project and keep basic project details ready.

applicationProcess.title: Apply on PMEGP portal
applicationProcess.description: Submit the online PMEGP application and select the implementing agency or bank path.

applicationProcess.title: Complete bank and training steps
applicationProcess.description: Respond to scrutiny, interview, EDP training, and bank processing if shortlisted.

helplineNumber: Contact KVIC / DIC / nodal bank branch

name: Apprenticeship Training Portal
description: National apprenticeship portal for industry-linked training opportunities.
descriptionDetailed: The Apprenticeship Training Portal connects learners and job-seekers with apprenticeship opportunities that combine basic training with on-the-job practical learning in establishments across India.

notes: Eligibility varies by apprenticeship type, trade, and employer requirements.
Applicants typically need relevant education or training background for the chosen opportunity.

benefits.title: Hands-on training
benefits.description: Candidates receive practical workplace learning through apprenticeship contracts.

benefits.title: Stipend support
benefits.description: Many apprenticeship opportunities provide a stipend during training.

applicationProcess.title: Create candidate profile
applicationProcess.description: Register on the national apprenticeship portal with education and contact details.

applicationProcess.title: Browse openings
applicationProcess.description: Search for apprenticeship opportunities by location, trade, or employer.

applicationProcess.title: Apply and track
applicationProcess.description: Apply online and monitor updates from the employer or training establishment.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY)
description: Support for fisheries development, aquaculture, value chain, and fishers' welfare activities.
descriptionDetailed: PMMSY is a national fisheries development scheme that supports infrastructure, production, productivity, post-harvest management, and welfare-oriented interventions across the fisheries value chain.

notes: Eligible activities and subsidy patterns vary by component, state implementation, and beneficiary category.
Beneficiary selection and project sanction often happen through the concerned State or Union Territory fisheries department.

benefits.title: Project assistance
benefits.description: Financial support is available for eligible fisheries and aquaculture activities under scheme guidelines.

benefits.title: Infrastructure and value chain support
benefits.description: The scheme supports assets such as ponds, hatcheries, cold chain, transport, marketing, and related fisheries infrastructure.

applicationProcess.title: Identify eligible activity
applicationProcess.description: Check the fisheries activity or project component relevant to your work.

applicationProcess.title: Apply through fisheries channel
applicationProcess.description: Use the PMMSY portal or contact the State fisheries department for the active beneficiary workflow.

applicationProcess.title: Submit project details
applicationProcess.description: Provide quotations, land or water-body details, category proofs, and bank information where required.

documents: Relevant fisheries license or local approval if applicable

name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University Students
description: Scholarship support for meritorious students from lower-income families pursuing higher studies.
descriptionDetailed: This central scholarship supports meritorious students from economically weaker families to continue regular college, university, and professional higher education courses.

notes: Applicant should be above the 80th percentile in Class 12 or equivalent examination in the relevant board stream.
Family income should be within the scheme ceiling in current guidelines.
Student should be pursuing a regular higher education course and should not be receiving another major scholarship for the same purpose.

benefits.title: Graduation scholarship
benefits.description: Support for the first years of eligible college and university study as per current norms.

benefits.title: Postgraduate or advanced year support
benefits.description: Higher annual support applies for postgraduate study or specified advanced years under the scheme rules.

applicationProcess.title: Confirm board merit and income eligibility
applicationProcess.description: Check percentile position, family income, and course eligibility before applying.

applicationProcess.title: Apply on NSP
applicationProcess.description: Register and submit the scholarship application through the National Scholarship Portal.

applicationProcess.title: Track verification
applicationProcess.description: Monitor institute, state, and central verification status on the portal.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Comprehensive crop insurance scheme from pre-sowing to post-harvest.
descriptionDetailed: PMFBY provides insurance cover against crop loss due to non-preventable natural risks, ensuring financial stability for farmers.

notes: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas are eligible.
Voluntary for all farmers.

benefits.title: Crop Insurance
benefits.description: Financial support in case of crop failure due to natural calamities, pests & diseases.

applicationProcess.title: Contact Bank/CSC
applicationProcess.description: Approach nearest bank branch, CSC, or authorized insurance agent.

applicationProcess.title: Submit Details
applicationProcess.description: Provide land details, bank account, and sowing certificate.

applicationProcess.title: Pay Premium
applicationProcess.description: Pay the nominal premium (1.5% - 2% for Rabi/Kharif, 5% for commercial/horticultural).

name: PM KUSUM Yojana
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
description: Subsidies for setting up solar pumps and grid-connected solar power plants.
descriptionDetailed: PM-KUSUM aims to provide energy security to farmers by subsidizing standalone solar agriculture pumps and solarization of existing grid-connected pumps.

notes: Farmers, groups of farmers, cooperatives, and panchayats are eligible.
Requires adequate land for solar installation.

benefits.title: Solar Pump Subsidy
benefits.description: CFA of 30% and State Government subsidy of 30% on the benchmark cost.

applicationProcess.title: Register on State Portal
applicationProcess.description: Apply through the respective State Nodal Agency (SNA) portal.

applicationProcess.title: Pay Farmer Share
applicationProcess.description: Deposit the 40% farmer share after application approval.

applicationProcess.title: Installation
applicationProcess.description: Vendor selected by SNA installs the solar pump.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Provides farmers with the nutrient status of their soil along with recommendations.
descriptionDetailed: The scheme provides a printed Soil Health Card to farmers every two years, containing the status of soil nutrients and recommendations on appropriate dosage of nutrients/fertilizers.

notes: Available to all farmers having agricultural land.

benefits.title: Free Soil Testing
benefits.description: Soil samples are collected and tested in labs for free or nominal charge.

benefits.title: Fertilizer Recommendations
benefits.description: Helps in reducing cultivation cost and improving yield.

applicationProcess.title: Sample Collection
applicationProcess.description: State Govt officials collect soil samples from the farm.

applicationProcess.title: Testing
applicationProcess.description: Samples are tested in the nearest soil testing laboratory.

applicationProcess.title: Card Generation
applicationProcess.description: The Soil Health Card is generated and distributed to the farmer.

name: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maandhan
description: Voluntary and contributory pension scheme for unorganised workers.
descriptionDetailed: PM-SYM is a pension scheme for unorganised workers. Each subscriber shall receive minimum assured pension of Rs 3000/- per month after attaining the age of 60 years.

notes: Must not be engaged in Organized Sector (member of EPFO/NPS/ESIC).
Monthly income must be Rs 15,000 or below.

benefits.title: Assured Pension
benefits.description: Monthly pension starting from age 60.

benefits.title: Matching Contribution
benefits.description: Central Govt contributes an equal matching amount in the pension account.

applicationProcess.title: Visit CSC
applicationProcess.description: Go to the nearest Common Service Centre.

applicationProcess.title: Enrollment
applicationProcess.description: Provide Aadhaar, Savings Bank Passbook, and initial contribution.

applicationProcess.title: Auto Debit
applicationProcess.description: Subsequent monthly contributions are auto-debited.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
description: Placement linked skill development program for rural youth.
descriptionDetailed: DDU-GKY aims to skill rural youth who are poor and provide them with jobs having regular monthly wages or above the minimum wages.

notes: Must be from a rural poor household.
Upper age limit is 45 years for women and vulnerable groups.

benefits.title: Free Skill Training
benefits.description: Free training, boarding, lodging, and uniforms.

benefits.title: Placement Assistance
benefits.description: Guaranteed placement for at least 70% trained candidates.

applicationProcess.title: Find Training Center
applicationProcess.description: Locate the nearest DDU-GKY Project Implementing Agency (PIA).

applicationProcess.title: Registration
applicationProcess.description: Register with BPL card/MGNREGA worker card.

applicationProcess.title: Attend Training
applicationProcess.description: Complete the 3-12 month residential/non-residential course.

documents: MGNREGA Job Card of family member

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: A guaranteed pension scheme administered by PFRDA primarily for unorganised sector workers.
descriptionDetailed: APY provides a guaranteed minimum monthly pension ranging from Rs. 1000 to Rs. 5000 based on the contributions made by the subscriber.

notes: Subscriber must have a savings bank account or post office savings bank account.
Since Oct 2022, income tax payers are not eligible to join.

benefits.title: Guaranteed Pension
benefits.description: Guaranteed minimum monthly pension after 60 years.

applicationProcess.title: Visit Bank/Post Office
applicationProcess.description: Approach the bank/post office where you hold a savings account.

applicationProcess.title: Fill APY Form
applicationProcess.description: Provide Aadhaar and mobile number.

applicationProcess.title: Auto Debit
applicationProcess.description: Ensure sufficient balance for periodic contribution auto-debits.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
description: Scheme to bring about Blue Revolution through sustainable development of fisheries.
descriptionDetailed: PMMSY aims to enhance fish production and productivity, modernize the value chain, and ensure social and physical security for fishers.

notes: Includes fishers, fish farmers, fish workers, and fish vendors.

benefits.title: Project Subsidy
benefits.description: Financial assistance for fishing vessels, aquaculture, cold chains, and infrastructure.

benefits.title: Livelihood Support
benefits.description: Support during fishing ban/lean periods (with fisher contribution).

applicationProcess.title: Submit Proposal
applicationProcess.description: Submit detailed project report/application to the State Fisheries Department.

applicationProcess.title: Verification
applicationProcess.description: District/State Level Committee scrutinizes the proposal.

applicationProcess.title: Sanction & Subsidy
applicationProcess.description: Subsidy is released in installments directly into bank accounts.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC) for Fisheries
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
description: Short-term credit limits to meet working capital requirements for fisheries.
descriptionDetailed: Extension of KCC facility to fishers and fish farmers to help them meet their working capital needs for fish capture/culture.

notes: Inland fishers, marine fishers, aquaculture farmers, SHGs, and JLGs are eligible.

benefits.title: Working Capital Loan
benefits.description: Credit limit for fisheries activities at concessional interest rates.

benefits.title: Interest Subvention
benefits.description: Interest subvention of 2% and prompt repayment incentive of 3%.

applicationProcess.title: Approach Bank
applicationProcess.description: Visit a commercial bank, RRB, or cooperative bank.

applicationProcess.title: Submit Form
applicationProcess.description: Fill the KCC application form with fisheries details.

applicationProcess.title: Card Issuance
applicationProcess.description: Credit limit is sanctioned and a KCC is issued.

name: Group Accident Insurance for Fishermen
description: Accident insurance coverage for registered fishermen.
descriptionDetailed: Provides insurance coverage against accidental death or permanent disability while engaged in fishing activities.

notes: Must be a registered fisher with the state fisheries department.

benefits.title: Accidental Death/Disability Cover
benefits.description: Lump sum amount in case of accidental death or permanent total disability.

benefits.title: Partial Disability Cover
benefits.description: Support for permanent partial disability.

applicationProcess.title: Registration
applicationProcess.description: Register with the local Fisheries Cooperative Society or State Fisheries Dept.

applicationProcess.title: Premium Payment
applicationProcess.description: Premium is mostly shared by Center and State Govt.

applicationProcess.title: Claim Submission
applicationProcess.description: In case of accident, submit claim forms through the Fisheries Dept.

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description: Holistic end-to-end support to traditional artisans and craftspeople.
descriptionDetailed: Provides recognition, skill upgradation, toolkit incentive, credit support, and marketing assistance to artisans like carpenters, goldsmiths, blacksmiths, weavers, etc.

notes: Must be engaged in one of the 18 specified traditional trades.
One member per family is eligible.

benefits.title: Toolkit Incentive
benefits.description: Grant to purchase modern tools.

benefits.title: Credit Support
benefits.description: Collateral-free loan in two tranches at 5% concessional interest.

benefits.title: Skill Training Stipend
benefits.description: Stipend during basic and advanced skill training.

applicationProcess.title: Register on Portal/CSC
applicationProcess.description: Register through Common Service Centers.

applicationProcess.title: Verification
applicationProcess.description: Three-tier verification by Gram Panchayat, District, and State Committees.

applicationProcess.title: Certification
applicationProcess.description: Receive PM Vishwakarma Certificate and ID card.

name: Ambedkar Hastshilp Vikas Yojana
description: Empowerment of handicraft artisans through mobilization, training, and marketing.
descriptionDetailed: AHVY mobilizes artisans into Self Help Groups/Societies and provides them with design & technology upgradation, infrastructure, and marketing support.

notes: Targeted at organized groups of artisans, NGOs, and Cooperatives.

benefits.title: Design & Skill Training
benefits.description: Workshops and training for design development.

benefits.title: Marketing Support
benefits.description: Participation in exhibitions and craft bazars.

benefits.title: Infrastructure
benefits.description: Setting up of Common Facility Centers.

applicationProcess.title: Form a Group
applicationProcess.description: Artisans must form an SHG or Cooperative.

applicationProcess.title: Submit Proposal
applicationProcess.description: Apply through the Regional Office of Development Commissioner (Handicrafts).

applicationProcess.title: Approval
applicationProcess.description: Funds are released to the implementing agency.

name: MUDRA Loan for Artisans (Weaver MUDRA)
description: Concessional credit specifically tailored for handloom weavers and artisans.
descriptionDetailed: Provides working capital and term loans to handloom weavers and artisans at concessional interest rates with margin money assistance.

notes: Must possess a Weaver ID card or Artisan Pehchan card.

benefits.title: Margin Money Assistance
benefits.description: 20% of the loan amount up to Rs 10,000 is provided as margin money.

benefits.title: Interest Subvention
benefits.description: Interest rate capped at 6% for loans up to Rs 2 Lakhs for a period of 3 years.

applicationProcess.title: Obtain ID Card
applicationProcess.description: Get Weaver/Artisan Pehchan Card from the department.

applicationProcess.title: Apply at Bank
applicationProcess.description: Submit MUDRA loan application at a local bank.

applicationProcess.title: Loan Disbursement
applicationProcess.description: Loan is sanctioned along with margin money and interest subvention benefits.

name: BOCW Education Assistance Scheme
description: Financial assistance for the education of children of registered construction workers.
descriptionDetailed: State BOCW boards provide scholarships to children of registered building and other construction workers from Class 1 to higher education.

notes: Worker must be registered with the State BOCW Welfare Board for at least 1 year.
Child must be studying in a recognized institution.

benefits.title: Annual Scholarship
benefits.description: Amount varies by state and level of education (School to Professional Degrees).

applicationProcess.title: Register as Worker
applicationProcess.description: Register with the State BOCW Welfare Board.

applicationProcess.title: Submit Application
applicationProcess.description: Apply through the State Labor Department portal with child's school certificates.

applicationProcess.title: DBT Transfer
applicationProcess.description: Funds transferred directly to the bank account.

name: NIPUN (National Initiative for Promoting Upskilling of Nirman workers)
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Skill training and certification program for construction workers.
descriptionDetailed: NIPUN aims to train over 1 lakh construction workers through fresh skilling and upskilling programs (RPL) to enhance their capabilities and wages.

notes: Targeted at both fresh candidates and existing construction workers.

benefits.title: Free Training
benefits.description: Free skill training and assessment.

benefits.title: Insurance Cover
benefits.description: Trainees receive free Kaushal Bima (accident insurance) for 3 years.

benefits.title: Stipend
benefits.description: Wage compensation during the RPL training period.

applicationProcess.title: Find Training Center
applicationProcess.description: Locate an NSDC affiliated training center.

applicationProcess.title: Enrollment
applicationProcess.description: Register for RPL (Recognition of Prior Learning) or fresh skilling.

applicationProcess.title: Certification
applicationProcess.description: Clear the assessment to receive an NSDC certificate.

name: BOCW Maternity Benefit Scheme
description: Financial assistance for pregnancy and delivery for female construction workers or wives of male registered workers.
descriptionDetailed: State BOCW boards provide direct cash assistance to registered female construction workers during maternity to compensate for wage loss.

notes: Worker must be registered with BOCW Board.
Benefit is generally limited to the first two deliveries.

benefits.title: Maternity Benefit
benefits.description: Amount varies significantly by state. Paid in installments.

applicationProcess.title: Register with BOCW
applicationProcess.description: Ensure active registration with the State Welfare Board.

applicationProcess.title: Submit Medical Docs
applicationProcess.description: Submit hospital delivery certificate and birth certificate.

applicationProcess.title: Receive Funds
applicationProcess.description: Amount is credited directly to the bank account.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
description: Free LPG connection to women from BPL and poor households.
descriptionDetailed: PMUY aims to safeguard the health of women & children by providing them with a clean cooking fuel (LPG) without an upfront deposit fee.

notes: Applicant must be an adult woman from a poor household.
No existing LPG connection in the household.

benefits.title: Free LPG Connection
benefits.description: Deposit-free LPG connection including cylinder, regulator, and hose.

benefits.title: Refill Subsidy
benefits.description: Targeted subsidy up to 12 refills per year.

applicationProcess.title: Contact Distributor
applicationProcess.description: Visit the nearest LPG distributor.

applicationProcess.title: Submit KYC
applicationProcess.description: Submit PMUY application form with KYC documents.

applicationProcess.title: Installation
applicationProcess.description: Connection is issued after clearing deduplication checks.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Maternity benefit programme providing cash incentive to pregnant women.
descriptionDetailed: A cash incentive provided directly to the bank account of pregnant women and lactating mothers for first and second live births to meet enhanced nutritional needs and compensate for wage loss.

notes: Applicable for the first two live births (second child must be a girl).
Excludes regular employees of Central/State Govts/PSUs.

benefits.title: Cash Incentive
benefits.description: Paid in two installments upon early registration and institutional delivery.

benefits.title: Girl Child Benefit
benefits.description: Single installment if the second child is a girl.

applicationProcess.title: Register Pregnancy
applicationProcess.description: Register at the nearest Anganwadi Centre or ASHA worker.

applicationProcess.title: Submit Form
applicationProcess.description: Submit application form along with MCP Card.

applicationProcess.title: DBT Transfer
applicationProcess.description: Funds are transferred directly via Aadhaar linked bank account.

name: Swachh Bharat Mission (Toilet Subsidy)
ministry: Ministry of Jal Shakti / Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Financial incentive for the construction of Individual Household Latrines (IHHL).
descriptionDetailed: Provides an incentive to BPL and identified APL households to construct and use household toilets, promoting sanitation and hygiene.

notes: Household should not already possess a toilet.
Applicable for all BPL and certain identified APL households.

benefits.title: Construction Incentive
benefits.description: Provided for the construction of one unit of IHHL.

applicationProcess.title: Apply Online/Offline
applicationProcess.description: Submit an application at the Gram Panchayat or online portal.

applicationProcess.title: Verification
applicationProcess.description: Officials verify the lack of a toilet and approve the application.

applicationProcess.title: Fund Release
applicationProcess.description: Funds released post-construction and geo-tagging.

name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description: Credit-linked subsidy program to generate employment through micro-enterprises.
descriptionDetailed: PMEGP provides financial assistance to set up new self-employment ventures/projects/micro-enterprises in non-farm sectors.

notes: Minimum VIII pass for projects > 10 Lakh (Mfg) / 5 Lakh (Service).
Only new projects are eligible.

benefits.title: Margin Money Subsidy
benefits.description: Subsidy depends on urban/rural location and category (General/Special).

benefits.title: Bank Loan
benefits.amount: Up to Rs 50 Lakh (Mfg) / Rs 20 Lakh (Service)
benefits.description: Balance amount provided as term loan by banks.

applicationProcess.title: Online Application
applicationProcess.description: Apply on the KVIC online portal.

applicationProcess.title: Interview/Selection
applicationProcess.description: District Task Force Committee interviews the applicant.

applicationProcess.title: Bank Sanction
applicationProcess.description: Bank sanctions the loan and claims the margin money subsidy.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Facilitates bank loans for SC/ST and Women entrepreneurs.
descriptionDetailed: Stand-Up India aims to promote entrepreneurship among Women and SC/ST communities by facilitating bank loans for setting up a new enterprise.

notes: Applicant must be SC/ST or a Woman entrepreneur.
Loan is available only for greenfield (new) enterprises in manufacturing, services, agri-allied, or trading sectors.

benefits.title: Term Loan/Working Capital
benefits.description: Composite loan to cover 85% of project cost.

applicationProcess.title: Prepare Project
applicationProcess.description: Ready a detailed business project report.

applicationProcess.title: Apply Online
applicationProcess.description: Apply through the Stand-Up India portal, Lead District Manager, or directly at a bank branch.

applicationProcess.title: Loan Approval
applicationProcess.description: Bank processes the application and sanctions the loan.

name: PM SVANidhi
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Special micro-credit facility for Street Vendors.
descriptionDetailed: PM SVANidhi provides affordable working capital loans to street vendors to resume their livelihoods.

notes: Must be a street vendor operating in urban areas.
Must possess a Certificate of Vending/Identity Card issued by ULBs.

benefits.title: Working Capital Loan
benefits.description: Initial loan of 10k, enhanced upon prompt repayment to 20k and 50k.

benefits.title: Interest Subsidy
benefits.description: Interest subsidy credited quarterly for prompt repayment.

applicationProcess.title: Get LoR/CoV
applicationProcess.description: Obtain Letter of Recommendation or Certificate of Vending from ULB.

applicationProcess.title: Apply Online
applicationProcess.description: Apply via the PM SVANidhi portal or visit a CSC/bank.

applicationProcess.title: Disbursement
applicationProcess.description: Loan is disbursed directly to the vendor's bank account.

name: PM YASASVI Scholarship Scheme
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Scholarship scheme for OBC, EBC, and DNT students studying in classes 9 to 12.
descriptionDetailed: PM Young Achievers Scholarship Award Scheme for Vibrant India (YASASVI) provides Pre-Matric and Post-Matric scholarships to eligible students to continue their education.

notes: Annual family income must be less than Rs. 2.5 Lakhs.
Must be studying in a recognized Top Class School.

benefits.title: Pre-Matric Scholarship
benefits.description: For classes 9th and 10th.

benefits.title: Post-Matric Scholarship
benefits.description: Varies based on course level.

applicationProcess.title: Register on NSP
applicationProcess.description: Apply through the National Scholarship Portal.

applicationProcess.title: Clear Entrance Test
applicationProcess.description: Sometimes requires passing the YASASVI Entrance Test (YET).

applicationProcess.title: Verification
applicationProcess.description: School and State level verification of documents.

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship
description: Scholarships awarded to meritorious students of economically weaker sections to arrest dropouts in class VIII.
descriptionDetailed: NMMSS provides financial assistance to meritorious students to encourage them to continue their study at the secondary stage.

notes: Must have scored minimum 55% in Class VII.
Parental income should not exceed Rs 3,50,000 per annum.

benefits.title: Scholarship Amount
benefits.description: Provided for classes IX to XII.

applicationProcess.title: Clear Selection Test
applicationProcess.description: Pass the state-level selection examination.

applicationProcess.title: Apply on NSP
applicationProcess.description: Submit scholarship application on National Scholarship Portal.

applicationProcess.title: Renewal
applicationProcess.description: Maintain minimum required marks to renew each year.

name: Ishan Uday Special Scholarship Scheme for NER
description: Special scholarship scheme for students of the North Eastern Region.
descriptionDetailed: Ishan Uday promotes higher education and encourages children belonging to the North Eastern Region to pursue general degree courses, technical, and professional courses.

notes: Domicile of NER State.
Annual family income not to exceed Rs. 4.5 Lakh.

benefits.title: Monthly Stipend
benefits.description: Depends on the type of course (General Degree vs Professional).

applicationProcess.title: Admission
applicationProcess.description: Secure admission in a recognized university/college.

applicationProcess.title: Apply Online
applicationProcess.description: Apply via the National Scholarship Portal.

applicationProcess.title: Verification
applicationProcess.description: Institutional verification followed by fund transfer.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: Flagship scheme to enable Indian youth to take up industry-relevant skill training.
descriptionDetailed: PMKVY provides free short-term training and Recognition of Prior Learning (RPL) to school/college dropouts and unemployed youth.

notes: Open to any candidate of Indian nationality.
Priority given to school/college dropouts.

benefits.title: Free Training
benefits.description: Industry recognized skill training and certification.

benefits.title: Placement Assistance
benefits.description: Job fairs and placement support provided by training centers.

applicationProcess.title: Register on Skill India
applicationProcess.description: Enroll on the Skill India Digital Portal.

applicationProcess.title: Select Course
applicationProcess.description: Choose an affiliated PMKVY Training Center.

applicationProcess.title: Assessment & Certification
applicationProcess.description: Complete the course and clear the third-party assessment.

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: Promotes apprenticeship training and incentivizes employers.
descriptionDetailed: NAPS provides financial support to establishments undertaking apprenticeship programs and helps youth gain practical industry experience while earning a stipend.

notes: Candidate must have minimum educational qualification required for the specific trade.

benefits.title: Monthly Stipend
benefits.description: Stipend is paid during the training period. Govt shares 25% of the stipend (up to Rs 1500).

benefits.title: On-the-job Training
benefits.description: Practical experience leading to a National Apprenticeship Certificate.

applicationProcess.title: Register on Portal
applicationProcess.description: Register on the Apprenticeship India portal.

applicationProcess.title: Apply for Opportunities
applicationProcess.description: Search and apply for apprenticeship openings in various companies.

applicationProcess.title: Sign Contract
applicationProcess.description: Sign the apprenticeship contract with the employer.

name: Rural Self Employment Training Institutes
description: Free intensive short term residential training for rural youth for self-employment.
descriptionDetailed: RSETIs are managed by banks with active co-operation from Govt. of India to mitigate the unemployment problem among rural youth through self-employment.

notes: Targeted at rural BPL youth.

benefits.title: Free Training
benefits.description: Free training with food and accommodation.

benefits.title: Credit Linkage
benefits.description: Banks assist in providing loans to set up micro-enterprises post-training.

applicationProcess.title: Locate RSETI
applicationProcess.description: Find the Lead Bank RSETI in your district.

applicationProcess.title: Enroll
applicationProcess.description: Submit application with BPL proof/MGNREGA card.

applicationProcess.title: Handholding
applicationProcess.description: Receive 2 years of post-training handholding support.

name: Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana
description: Pension scheme exclusively for senior citizens providing an assured return.
descriptionDetailed: PMVVY is implemented through LIC and offers a guaranteed payout of pension at a specified rate for 10 years.

notes: Must be 60 years or above.
Requires lumpsum investment (Purchase price).

benefits.title: Assured Pension
benefits.description: Guaranteed pension paid monthly, quarterly, half-yearly or yearly.

applicationProcess.title: Visit LIC Branch
applicationProcess.description: Approach any LIC office or buy online from LIC website.

applicationProcess.title: Pay Lumpsum
applicationProcess.description: Invest the purchase price amount.

applicationProcess.title: Receive Pension
applicationProcess.description: Pension begins as per the chosen frequency.

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
description: Non-contributory old age pension scheme for BPL individuals.
descriptionDetailed: IGNOAPS provides a monthly pension to senior citizens belonging to below poverty line households, supported by both central and state governments.

notes: Applicant must belong to a BPL household.
Destitute elderly are prioritized.

benefits.title: Monthly Pension
benefits.description: Central contribution is Rs 200 (60-79 yrs) or Rs 500 (80+ yrs). States add matching or higher amounts.

applicationProcess.title: Apply locally
applicationProcess.description: Submit application to Gram Panchayat / Municipality.

applicationProcess.title: Verification
applicationProcess.description: Local officials verify age and BPL status.

applicationProcess.title: DBT Transfer
applicationProcess.description: Pension is credited directly into the bank or post office account.

name: Naya Savera Scheme
description: Free coaching and allied scheme for candidates belonging to minority communities.
descriptionDetailed: Naya Savera assists students/candidates from minority communities by providing free coaching for qualifying examinations for admission in technical/professional courses and competitive exams.

notes: Must belong to notified minority communities (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Jain, Parsi).
Family income must not exceed Rs. 6 Lakh per annum.

benefits.title: Free Coaching
benefits.description: Coaching fees paid directly to impanelled institutions.

benefits.title: Stipend
benefits.description: Stipend paid directly to the student for the duration of the coaching.

applicationProcess.title: Select Institute
applicationProcess.description: Find an empaneled coaching institution in your area.

applicationProcess.title: Enroll
applicationProcess.description: Submit application directly to the coaching center with income and community proof.

applicationProcess.title: Attend Classes
applicationProcess.description: Maintain minimum attendance to receive the stipend.
